Acc: Acceleration rate (units/frame²) for rail-operated objects. Controls how quickly the object speeds up along its rail. [IDA: RailOperateObjOcta]
AccOff: Deceleration rate when the toggle point's switch turns off. Controls how fast the rail object slows to a stop. [IDA: RailTogglePointParams]
AccOn: Acceleration rate when the toggle point's switch turns on. Controls how fast the rail object speeds up from rest. [IDA: RailTogglePointParams]
AccelDecr: Rate at which rotation speed decreases when decelerating. [IDA: DendenLiftVersusParams/RotateTogglePointParams]
AccelIncr: Rate at which rotation speed increases when accelerating. [IDA: DendenLiftVersusParams/RotateTogglePointParams]
AccentCtrl_0: Visual accent control channel 0 for tutorial text display effects. [IDA: SwitchTutorialTextParams]
AccentCtrl_1: Visual accent control channel 1 for tutorial text display effects. [IDA: SwitchTutorialTextParams]
Action: Action identifier string for plaza behavior areas. [IDA: PlazaActionAreaParams]
ActionGuideVssRadius: Radius (game units) around an online auto-warp point within which the action guide UI is shown. [IDA: AutoWarpPointOnlineParams]
ActorName: String name of the actor type to reference or spawn. [IDA: BreakCounterBaseOctaParams/IkuraRailingObjOctaParams]
AdditionalIkuraNum: Extra Power Eggs added when the switch area's player action condition is met. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
AdditionalTimeSec: Extra time in seconds added when reaching this checkpoint. [IDA: CheckPointForTimeLimitOctaParams]
AirBallHangableParams__IsPurgeAirBallWhe: When true, attached air balls are purged when maximum hanging count is exceeded. [IDA: AirBallHangableParams]
AirBallIkuraDropNum: Number of Power Eggs dropped when an enemy's attached air ball is destroyed. [IDA: EnemyParams]
AirResistance: Boolean. Applies air resistance physics to objects within this patch area. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
AllocatableRadius: Radius within which coop enemies can be allocated for spawning. [IDA: Coop::LocatorSpawnBoxParams]
AmbushSearchRadius: Radius within which the enemy detects players and initiates ambush. [IDA: EnemyTakolienMovableParams/EnemyTakopterParams]
Angle: Launch angle (degrees) for spawned projectiles. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
Anim: Animation index to play from the actor's animation set. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:BaseCampNpcLocatorOcta]
Anim0: Primary animation name/index for Jerry (decorative NPC) objects. [IDA: JerryParams]
AnimStartFrame: Frame number at which the animation starts playing. Used to offset timing between objects. [IDA: JerryParams]
Appear: Appearance condition/schedule index. Controls when the NPC becomes visible. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
AppearId: Appearance group ID. Spawn points sharing the same AppearId activate together. [IDA: Coop::SpawnPointParams]
AppearNum: Maximum number of rival squad instances that can appear simultaneously. [IDA: RivalAppearAreaParams]
AreaIdx: Area zone index identifying which gameplay zone this belongs to. [IDA: AreaGatewayParams/SwitchTutorialBgmParams]
AreaNo: Area number for world map zone-based warp/jump targeting. [IDA: WorldAreaJumpTargetPosParams]
AttackDecayTime: Time in frames for attack power to decay. [IDA: EnemyPatrollerOctaParams]
AttackPermitNum: Maximum enemies permitted to attack the player simultaneously within this area. [IDA: AttackPermitNumAreaParams]
AttractOffest__X: X-axis offset from the attract target position. [IDA: 5.5.2 AttractTargetParams::readMuObj]
AttractOffest__Y: Y-axis offset from the attract target position. [IDA: 5.5.2 AttractTargetParams::readMuObj]
AttractOffest__Z: Z-axis offset from the attract target position. [IDA: 5.5.2 AttractTargetParams::readMuObj]
BarrierBreakSwitchableParams__InitialSta: Initial on/off state for the barrier break switch. 0=Off, 1=On. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
BarrierBreakSwitchableParams__RespawnRes: Whether barrier break switch resets on respawn. 0=Persists, 1=Resets. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
Behaviour: Behavior pattern index for ink rails in versus mode. [IDA: InkRailVersusParams]
BeingHeldDay: Day index when the signboard is being held during Splatfest. -1=Never. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:PlazaFestSignboard]
BgmTriggerFrame: Frame at which the BGM trigger activates during a camera demo. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
BgmTriggerName: String name of the BGM track triggered during the camera demo. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
BigLaserItemSpawnAnnounceFrame: Frame at which big laser item spawn is announced during Final Fest. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:LastFestInGameDirectorOnline]
BigLaserItemSpawnFrame: Frame at which the big laser item spawns during Final Fest. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:LastFestInGameDirectorOnline]
BombCoreDamage: Damage dealt by the bomb core explosion. [IDA: IidaBombLocatorOctaParams]
BombCoreDamageRadius: Radius of the bomb core damage area. [IDA: IidaBombLocatorOctaParams]
BombCorePaintRadius: Radius of ink splatter from the bomb core explosion. [IDA: IidaBombLocatorOctaParams]
BossIdx: Index identifying which boss fight this gateway leads to. [IDA: GatewayBossParams]
BrakeAcc: Braking acceleration applied to the sighter target when decelerating. [IDA: SighterTargetParams]
Braking_Distance: Distance before the end point at which the lift begins braking. [IDA: TwoPointLiftParams]
Braking_Vel: Maximum velocity during the braking phase of movement. [IDA: TwoPointLiftParams]
BreakFrame: Frames the object pauses at rail break points before continuing. 0=No pause. [IDA: RailableParams]
CalcSuperBallHoverAltitudeBasedOnStartPo: Boolean. Calculates Baller hover altitude relative to geyser start Y position. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Geyser]
CautionFrame: Frames the caution warning displays when entering an enemy caution area. [IDA: EnemyCautionAreaOctaParams]
ChanceCnt: Number of chances the stamp enemy gives before entering aggressive attack. [IDA: EnemyStampOctaParams]
ChangeFolloweeFrame: Frame count between sequential followee target switches. [IDA: SequentialFollowObjOctaParams]
ChangeType: Transition type when changing followee targets. [IDA: SequentialFollowObjOctaParams]
CheckActorName_0: First actor name to check in combo area activation. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaOctaParams]
CheckActorName_1: Second actor name to check. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaOctaParams]
CheckActorName_2: Third actor name to check. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaOctaParams]
CheckColPillerContinuous: Boolean. Continuously checks collision with pillar geometry for item placement. [IDA: ItemParams]
CheckEnemy: Boolean. Also checks enemy defeat conditions in combo area. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaOctaParams]
CheckGndCollision: Boolean. Checks ground collision before applying ink. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
CheckInitialLaserCol: Boolean. Checks initial laser line-of-sight collision with terrain. [IDA: EnemyChargeParams/EnemySpinnerOctaParams]
CheckPos: Position check mode for contraflow (one-way) areas. [IDA: ContraflowAreaParams]
ClamSupplySpeed: Speed at which clams are consumed by the basket in Clam Blitz. [IDA: VictoryClamBasketParams]
ClothAnimFrame: Frame count for cloth physics animation on decorative objects. [IDA: JerryParams]
ColCapsuleOffsetYForEndMuParam: Y offset for the collision capsule at blowout endpoint. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:BlowoutsOnline]
ColCapsuleOffsetZForEndMuParam: Z offset for the collision capsule at blowout endpoint. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:BlowoutsOnline]
ColCapsuleRadiusForEndMuParam: Radius of the collision capsule at blowout endpoint. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:BlowoutsOnline]
ColCheckY: Y-axis collision check height for NPC spawn areas. [IDA: PlazaNpcRandomAreaParams]
ColorAnimFrame: Frame duration of the color animation cycle on jump panels. [IDA: JumpPanelParams]
ColorTypeVal: Color type value selecting ink/visual color variant. [IDA: IidaBombOctaParams]
CombineRailAndFreeRotate: Boolean. Combines rail-following rotation with free rotation parameters. [IDA: LiftParams]
CombineRotation: Boolean. Combines rotation from multiple sources additively. [IDA: LiftParams]
ComboNum: Number of conditions to meet simultaneously for combo switch activation. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaParams]
ComboTime: Time window (frames) within which all combo conditions must be fulfilled. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaParams]
ConnectionTime_Coop: Connection duration (frames) for ink rails in coop mode. [IDA: InkRailVersusParams]
ConvexAttachOnWall: Boolean. Enables convex wall attachment behavior within patch area. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
CountNum: Number of targets that must be destroyed to trigger the counter. [IDA: BreakCounterBaseOctaParams]
CrossPaintRadius: Radius of cross-shaped ink pattern from bomb explosions. [IDA: IidaBombLocatorOctaParams]
CrossPaintRayLength: Length of each ray in cross-shaped ink pattern. [IDA: IidaBombLocatorOctaParams]
CrossPaintRayRadius: Width of each ray in cross-shaped ink pattern. [IDA: IidaBombLocatorOctaParams]
Cycle: Spawning cycle period (frames) between enemy rock launches. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
DashPownerRate: Multiplier applied to dash power when using dash panels. Values 0.75-0.95. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:DashPanelVersus]
Day: Day index for Splatfest scheduling. -1=Any day. [IDA: 5.5.2 verified in PlazaFestSignboard params]
DbgText: Debug text string for development identification. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
DbgTextMain: Debug main text for tutorial text switches. [IDA: SwitchTutorialTextParams]
DbgTextSub: Debug sub text for tutorial text switches. [IDA: SwitchTutorialTextParams]
DbgWeaponMainId: Debug: Override main weapon ID for rival/bot testing. [IDA: RivalMapUnitParams]
DbgWeaponSubId: Debug: Override sub weapon ID for rival/bot testing. [IDA: RivalMapUnitParams]
DbgWeaponTrigFrame: Debug: Frame at which rival's weapon fires during testing. [IDA: RivalMapUnitParams]
Dec: Deceleration rate for rail-operated objects (units/frame²). [IDA: 5.5.2 RailOperateObj params]
DefaultTeam: Default team assignment for the rolling barrel. [IDA: RollingBarrelParams]
DegAxisY_SpawnFromGoal: Y-axis rotation (degrees) for clam spawn direction from goal in Clam Blitz. [IDA: VictoryClamBasketParams]
DegFixed: Fixed rotation angle (degrees) the toggle point rotates to. [IDA: RotateTogglePointParams]
DegStopLcm: LCM angle (degrees) for evenly-spaced rotation stop positions. [IDA: RotateTogglePointParams]
Delay: Delay (frames) before the object activates after spawning/triggering. [IDA: Various]
DelayFrame: Delay (frames) before ink bar or auto geyser begins its cycle. [IDA: InkBarParams/GeyserAutoParams]
DelayToChangeMinimap: Delay (frames) before minimap updates for sea surface changes. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
DelayToMove: Delay (frames) before sea surface begins moving. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
DelayToPlayPreSE: Delay (frames) before preliminary sound effect plays. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
DelayToPlaySE: Delay (frames) before main sound effect plays. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
DelayToShowUI: Delay (frames) before UI notification displays. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
DemoSkipIdx: Index into demo skip table for skippable demo sequences. [IDA: SwitchDemoPlayerParams]
DestMapFileName: Destination map BYAML file name for gateway warps. [IDA: GatewayBaseParams]
DestWorldMapName: Destination world map name for manhole warps. [IDA: GateManholeParams]
DetectPlayerIsNearDistanceXZ: XZ distance at which toggle point detects player proximity. [IDA: RailTogglePointParams]
DisableDepthShadow: Boolean. Disables depth-based shadow on the sponge. [IDA: SpongeOctaParams]
DisappearFrame_InWorld: Frames before navigate air ball disappears in overworld. [IDA: NavigateAirBallParams]
DispCoordX: X screen coordinate for timer display. [IDA: AnnounceTimerParams]
DispCoordY: Y screen coordinate for timer display. [IDA: AnnounceTimerParams]
DispScale: Display scale multiplier for timer UI. [IDA: AnnounceTimerParams]
DissmissWarning: Boolean. Suppresses super jump landing warning. [IDA: SuperJumpSafePosParams]
DokanWarpCameraYQuick: Boolean. Camera Y quickly snaps during warp pipe transition. [IDA: AutoWarpPointBaseParams]
DokanWarpMoveTime: Duration (frames) of warp pipe travel animation. [IDA: AutoWarpPointBaseParams]
DokanWarpStateStartSwitch__InitialState: Initial state for warp pipe switch. 0=Off (blocked), 1=On (passable). [IDA: SwitchableParams]
DokanWarpStateStartSwitch__RespawnReset: Whether warp pipe state resets on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
DontActivateOnRespawn: Boolean. Prevents item auto-activation when player respawns near it. [IDA: ItemParams]
DropIkuraEnemyLimitNum: Maximum enemies that can drop Power Eggs from this spawner. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerMultiParams]
DstMapUIID: Destination map UI identifier for auto-warp points. [IDA: AutoWarpPointNextStageOctaParams]
DurationFrame: Duration (frames) ink bar or auto geyser remains active each cycle. [IDA: InkBarParams/GeyserAutoParams]
EmitName: Name string identifying the emit area for 8-ball. [IDA: EmitAreaVBallOctaParams]
EmptyNoHand: Boolean. Allows empty-handed state (no weapon equipped). [IDA: WeaponSetterOctaParams]
EndSwitchableParams__InitialState: Initial on/off state for end-condition switch. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
EndSwitchableParams__RespawnReset: Whether end-condition switch resets on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
EnemyRailableParams__SolveType: Rail path interpolation method for enemies. [IDA: RailableParams]
EnemyRailable__SolveType: Rail interpolation variant for EnemyRailable component. [IDA: RailableParams]
EscapeRestHpBorder: HP threshold at which rival retreats. [IDA: RivalSquadOctaParams]
ExitMargin__X: X margin beyond switch area boundary before exit triggers. [IDA: SwitchAreaForObjOctaParams]
FacePaint: Boolean. Enables face-surface ink painting on stamp enemy attacks. [IDA: EnemyStampOctaParams]
FadeIn: Fade-in duration (frames) for audio ducking during demos. [IDA: DemoDuckingObjOctaParams]
FadeOut: Fade-out duration (frames) for audio ducking recovery. [IDA: DemoDuckingObjOctaParams]
FailureSwitchableParams__InitialState: Initial state for failure condition switch. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
FailureSwitchableParams__RespawnReset: Whether failure switch resets on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
FirstDirectlyAttack: Boolean. Stamp enemy attacks directly without approach phase. [IDA: EnemyStampParams]
FixedClothIdx: Fixed cloth animation index. -1=Default physics. [IDA: PlazaJerryLocatorParams]
FlagName: String name of the stage switch flag to check/set. [IDA: StageSwitchFlagCheckerParams]
FlgFarBank: Boolean. Marks geyser as on far bank for coop wave spawning. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:CoopSpawnGeyser]
FloatParam0: Generic float parameter 0. Meaning varies by PatchArea type. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
FlyAwayTime: Frames the shooting air ball flies before disappearing. [IDA: ShootingAirBallOctaParams]
FlyRotY: Y-axis rotation (degrees) for bird flight direction. [IDA: BirdParams]
ForceSkippable: Boolean. Forces demo to be skippable. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
ForecastCarefully: Boolean. Enables careful forecast calculations for this area. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:PatchArea]
Frame0: Starting frame for first camera demo segment. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
Frame1: Starting frame for second camera demo segment. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
Frame2: Starting frame for third camera demo segment. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
Frame3: Starting frame for fourth camera demo segment. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
FrameToEnd: Number of frames until the demo/sequence ends. [IDA: SwitchDemoPlayerOctaParams]
FreeRotDeg__X: Free rotation X angle (degrees). Lift rotates by this amount each cycle. [IDA: LiftParams]
GameFrame: Game frame count threshold for this switch trigger. [IDA: SwitchGameFrameParams]
GameFrameToStop: Game frame at which the painting lift stops. -1=Never stops. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
GateNumber: Gate number identifying which delivery gate this announcement is for. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:DeliTakoashiAnnounceObj]
GroupID: Numeric group identifier for area/zone grouping. [IDA: CullingAreaParams, EnemyMoveLimitAreaParams, RivalMoveLimitAreaOctaParams, SearchableAreaParams]
GroupName: Named group identifier for streaming/demo objects. [IDA: DemoDuckingObjOctaParams, StreamingObjParams]
HalfHeight: Half-height value for balance collision geometry. [IDA: BalanceParams]
Height: Height (game units) of the victory tower/lift platform in Tower Control. [IDA: VictoryLiftParams]
HeightBarrierCenter: Center height of the basket barrier in Clam Blitz. [IDA: VictoryClamBasketParams]
HeightLimitDown: Lower height limit for rival appearances from this area. [IDA: RivalAppearAreaParams]
HeightLimitUp: Upper height limit for rival appearances. [IDA: RivalAppearAreaParams]
HeroDeadType: Type of hero death behavior (for rival squad events). [IDA: RivalSquadOctaParams]
HeroWeaponLv: Hero weapon level for rival squad encounters. [IDA: RivalSquadOctaParams]
HikikomoriDetectionRate: Float. Detection rate for anti-camping behavior in Rainmaker mode. Higher values detect camping faster. [IDA: GachihokoParams]
IdolVehicleToDropLocatorFrame: Frame at which the Squid Sisters vehicle drops to its locator during Final Fest. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:LastFestInGameDirectorOnline]
IgnoreSwitchOffWarning: When true, suppresses the warning when a stage switch flag is turned off. [IDA: StageSwitchFlagSetterParams]
IidaBombDemoStartSwitch__InitialState: Initial state for bomb demo start switch. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
IidaBombDemoStartSwitch__RespawnReset: Whether bomb demo start switch resets on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
IidaBombLaunchFrame0: Frame at which first bomb launches in the sequence. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:IidaBomb]
IidaBombLaunchFrame1: Frame at which second bomb launches. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:IidaBomb]
IidaBombLaunchFrame2: Frame at which third bomb launches. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:IidaBomb]
IkuraDropNum: Number of Power Eggs dropped when destroyed. [IDA: AirBallParams/WoodenBoxParams]
IkuraNum: Number of Power Eggs contained/collected. [IDA: AerialRingParams]
IkuraRailingType: Salmon egg railing behavior type for Salmon Run. [IDA: IkuraRailingObjOctaParams]
ImpactVBall: Impact force value for volleyball mode jump panels. [IDA: JumpPanelOctaParams]
InDelay: Delay in frames before the entrance/fade-in begins. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
InTeamIndex: Team index for start position assignment (0=alpha, 1=bravo). [IDA: StartPosParams]
Infinity: When true, respawn count is unlimited. [IDA: RespawnNumSetterOctaParams]
InformSameState: Broadcasts same state to linked switches in sequence. [IDA: SwitchSequenceParams]
InkHidableParams__HideMode: Hide mode for ink-hideable objects in ink. [IDA: InkHidableParams]
InkHidable__HideMode: Hide mode variant for InkHidable component. [IDA: InkHidableParams]
InkLimit: Maximum ink capacity limit value. [IDA: InkLimitSetterOctaParams]
InnerRadius: Inner radius of 8-ball dash ring boost zone. [IDA: DashRingVBallOctaParams]
Interval: Interval (frames) between consecutive spawns or attacks. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerParams/EnemyTakoGabonParams]
IntervalFrame: Interval (frames) between ink bar activation cycles. [IDA: InkBarParams]
IsAbleToBeCulled: Boolean. Object can be culled (hidden) when off-screen. [IDA: LiftParams]
IsAbleViewFrustumCulling: Boolean. Supports view frustum culling for rendering optimization. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Jerry]
IsAirMoveLong: Boolean flag: When true, extends air movement distance for jump panels. [IDA: JumpPanelParams]
IsAlwaysCheckDokanWarpDangerous: Boolean. Always checks if warp pipe destination is dangerous. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:AutoWarpPoint]
IsAnnounceLastOne: Boolean flag: Whether to announce when the last target/counter remains. [IDA: BreakCounterClearOctaParams]
IsAppearAfterClearInWolrd: Boolean. Object only appears after stage is cleared. [IDA: DesignerObjParams]
IsAppearBySwitch: Boolean flag: Object appears when its linked switch is activated. [IDA: GrindRailParams]
IsAppearWithSwitchOn: Boolean flag: Object starts visible when switch is already on. [IDA: CheckPointBaseOctaParams]
IsArmorBreak: Boolean flag: Triggers armor break effect when entering the area. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsArmorBreak_Lv0: Boolean flag: Triggers level 0 armor break effect in the area. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsArmorRestore: Boolean flag: Restores armor when entering the area. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsArmorRestore_Lv0: Boolean flag: Restores level 0 armor when entering the area. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsAttachAirBall: Boolean. Air ball is attached to this enemy. [IDA: EnemyParams]
IsAttractCenter: Boolean flag: Attracts the player toward the center of the dash ring. [IDA: DashRingVBallOctaParams]
IsAutoGenOpposite: Boolean flag: Automatically generates a mirrored copy on the opposite side. [IDA: VictoryClamBasketParams]
IsBindXZOnActorBind: Boolean flag: Constrains XZ movement when bound to another actor. [IDA: WoodenBoxOctaParams]
IsBlockSuperJumpWorld: Boolean flag: Prevents super jump in the world/hub area. [IDA: DendenLiftVersus2Params]
IsBreakableByLargeEnemy: Boolean. Can be destroyed by large enemy attacks. [IDA: DesignerObjParams]
IsCalcChargeBulletSpecialCol: Boolean. Calculates special collision for charger shots against sponge. [IDA: SpongeParams]
IsCalcCurrRouteAreaWithUnsafePos: Boolean flag: Calculates current route area even at unsafe positions. [IDA: GachihokoRouteAreaParams]
IsCalcVelGndOneMoreLong: Boolean. Extends ground velocity calculation at endpoints. [IDA: LiftParams]
IsCameraReset: Boolean flag: Resets camera orientation on activation. [IDA: GrindRailParams]
IsCaterpiller: Boolean flag: Uses caterpillar/tracked movement style for the conveyor. [IDA: EnemyStampOctaParams]
IsChargerChargeFull: Boolean flag: Whether the charger weapon starts fully charged. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsChargerKeepCharge: Boolean flag: Charger weapon retains charge between shots. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsChaseFixedType: Boolean. Uses fixed-type chase pattern. [IDA: EnemyTakolienMovableParams]
IsCheckGndCol: Boolean flag: Enables ground collision checking for this object. [IDA: ItemIkuraParams]
IsCheckGrounded: Boolean flag: Checks whether the object is grounded before acting. [IDA: AutoWarpPointBaseParams]
IsCheckKeepOutE: Boolean flag: Checks enemy keep-out zones during pathfinding. [IDA: EnemyMegaCleanerParams]
IsClearPaintOnWarp: Boolean. Clears ink from lift surface on warp/teleport. [IDA: LiftParams]
IsCombineCustomView: Boolean flag: Combines with custom camera view settings. [IDA: EnemyPatrollerOctaParams]
IsContamineNoPreColSplash: Boolean flag: Disables pre-collision ink splash contamination. [IDA: EnemyFlyingHoheiMotherOctaParams]
IsCreateSpecificSLinkUserName: Boolean. Creates specific sound link user name for unique audio. [IDA: LiftParams]
IsCylinderMode: Boolean flag: Uses cylindrical detection volume instead of box. [IDA: EnemyCleanerParams]
IsDefaultMax: Boolean. Sponge starts at maximum expanded state. [IDA: SpongeParams]
IsDisplay: Boolean flag: Whether the object is visually displayed. [IDA: InformCheckPointObjOctaParams]
IsDisplayBaseModel: Boolean. Displays the base model of the ink bar. [IDA: InkBarParams]
IsDisplayCaution: Boolean flag: Shows a caution/warning indicator. [IDA: EnemyCautionAreaOctaParams]
IsDistanceSwitch: Boolean. Activates based on player distance. [IDA: RivalSquadParams]
IsDoublePrecisionGndCol: Boolean flag: Uses double-precision for ground collision checks. [IDA: PaintingLiftOctaParams]
IsDrawGear: Boolean flag: Renders gear/equipment on the character model. [IDA: ConveyerParams]
IsEasyHitWall: Boolean flag: Reduces wall hit detection difficulty. [IDA: EnemyRockOctaParams, IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
IsEdgeFall: Boolean flag: Allows falling off edges during movement. [IDA: ConveyerParams]
IsEnableCulling: Boolean flag: Enables view frustum culling for performance. [IDA: VictoryBallOctaParams]
IsEnableEve: Boolean flag: Enables evening/event mode behavior. [IDA: PlazaActionAreaParams, PlazaDoorParams]
IsEnableGravity: Boolean flag: Enables gravity physics on this object. [IDA: VictoryBallHoleOctaParams]
IsEnableOverlookFade: Boolean. Fades out when viewed from high camera angle. [IDA: JerryParams]
IsEndWithDecideButton: Boolean flag: Demo/text sequence ends when confirm button is pressed. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
IsExtendFillFootColBackward: Boolean flag: Extends foot collision fill detection backward. [IDA: EnemyStampOctaParams]
IsExtendFillFootColForward: Boolean flag: Extends foot collision fill detection forward. [IDA: EnemyStampOctaParams]
IsFaceToPlayerOnActivate: Boolean. Enemy faces player on activation. [IDA: EnemyParams]
IsFinalAirBallShowGuideAlways: Boolean flag: Always shows guide for the final air ball section. [IDA: NavigateAirBallParams]
IsFixedMtx: Boolean flag: Uses a fixed transformation matrix (no dynamic updates). [IDA: LocateHeroOctaParams]
IsFollowRailPointRotate: Boolean flag: Object rotation follows rail point rotation values. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
IsFollowRailRotate: Boolean flag: Object rotation follows the rail direction. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
IsForChase: Boolean. Object is designated for chase behavior. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:EnemyTakolienMovable/EnemyTakolienMovableOcta]
IsGachihokoSquidJamCrank: Boolean. Acts as a squid jam crank in Rainmaker mode. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:DendenLiftGroupVersus]
IsGenMirror: Boolean. Generates mirrored copy on opposite side. [IDA: VictoryClamSpawnPointParams]
IsGenMirror_AxisX: Boolean. Mirror axis is X instead of default Z. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:VictoryClamSpawnPoint]
IsGoalReverse: Boolean flag: Reverses the goal direction. [IDA: VictoryLiftOctaParams, VictoryLiftParams]
IsHiddenWait: Boolean. Rival waits in hidden state until triggered. [IDA: RivalSquadParams]
IsHitPaint: Boolean flag: Responds to ink/paint hits. [IDA: DamageConveyorOctaParams, DamageObjOctaParams]
IsHokoSwitch: Boolean flag: Functions as a Rainmaker (Gachihoko) mode switch. [IDA: RivalSquadOctaParams]
IsIgnoreGravity: Boolean flag: Ignores gravity for this object. [IDA: EnemyTakodozerOctaParams, EnemyTakodozerParams]
IsIgnoreRailAttAndRotate: Boolean flag: Ignores rail attachment orientation and rotation. [IDA: UFOParams]
IsIgnoreSecondSwitch: Boolean flag: Ignores the secondary switch condition. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
IsIncludeWoodenBoxAndAirBall: Boolean flag: Includes wooden boxes and air balls in target count. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaOctaParams, SwitchComboAreaParams]
IsInterCommuAlways: Boolean flag: Always activates inter-communication behavior. [IDA: EnemyCautionAreaOctaParams]
IsInterCommuFindPlayer: Boolean flag: Triggers inter-communication when player is found. [IDA: EnemyCautionAreaOctaParams]
IsJumpYEvenHitAsWall: Boolean. Treats Y-axis hits as wall even on jump panels. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:JumpPanelVersus]
IsKeepDuration: Boolean. Maintains duration even when switch state changes. [IDA: InkBarParams]
IsKeepout: Boolean. Prevents rival AI from entering this area. [IDA: RivalMapUnitParams]
IsKnockBackOnTouchFillUp: Boolean. Knocks player back when touching fully expanded sponge. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SpongeVersus]
IsLabelOff: Boolean flag: Hides the text label for this object. [IDA: WoodenBoxOctaParams]
IsLast: Boolean flag: Marks this as the final checkpoint in a sequence. [IDA: CheckPointHalfwayOctaParams, CheckPointParams]
IsLaunchTiming0: Boolean. Enables first launch timing slot. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:IidaBomb/IidaBombOnline]
IsLaunchTiming1: Boolean. Enables second launch timing slot. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:IidaBomb/IidaBombOnline]
IsLaunchTiming2: Boolean. Enables third launch timing slot. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:IidaBomb/IidaBombOnline]
IsLightModel: Boolean flag: Uses a simplified/lightweight model for performance. [IDA: GrindRailParams]
IsLightType: Boolean. Uses light-type rendering for the ink bar. [IDA: InkBarParams]
IsMovedByPlayer: Boolean flag: Can be physically pushed/moved by the player. [IDA: InkBarOctaParams]
IsNoGear: Boolean. Rival bot spawns without gear/equipment. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:RivalSquadOcta]
IsNoLifeSpan: Boolean flag: Object has no lifespan limit (persists indefinitely). [IDA: EnemyFlyingHoheiMotherOctaParams, EnemyFlyingHoheiMotherParams]
IsNotChangeInitMtxWithRail: Boolean. Initial orientation not adjusted to match rail direction. [IDA: EnemyHoheiParams]
IsNotOnVictoryLift: Boolean flag: Excluded from victory lift platform elevation. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
IsNotVGoal: Boolean flag: Not counted as a victory goal/objective. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
IsObjPaintForResult: Boolean. Ink on this object counts for turf war results. [IDA: LiftParams/DesignerObjParams]
IsOceanBind: Boolean. Bound to ocean surface height, bobs with waves. [IDA: JerryParams]
IsOnOnly: Boolean flag: Switch operates in on-only mode (cannot be turned off). [IDA: SwitchAndParams]
IsOnVictoryLift: Boolean flag: Placed on the victory lift platform. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
IsOnlyCountDead: Boolean flag: Only counts defeated/dead targets toward the goal. [IDA: SwitchComboAreaOctaParams]
IsOnlyPlayerKill: Boolean flag: Only player kills count (not environmental/AI). [IDA: SwitchAllDeadParams]
IsOpened: Boolean flag: Initial state is open/active. [IDA: InkRailParams]
IsOutlineOverWall: Boolean flag: Renders outline effect even when occluded by walls. [IDA: PaintTargetAreaParams]
IsPaintGnd: Boolean flag: Paints the ground surface with ink. [IDA: SpongeVersusParams]
IsPaintIfStop: Boolean. Painting lift continues painting when stopped. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
IsPatrolFDFixedType: Boolean. Fixed front-direction during patrol. [IDA: EnemyTakolienMovableParams]
IsPeakYLow: Boolean flag: Uses a lower Y peak height for trajectories. [IDA: AutoWarpPointNextStageOctaParams, AutoWarpPointWorldParams]
IsPlayTimerSE: Boolean flag: Plays timer sound effects. [IDA: PaintSwitchOctaParams]
IsPreventSuicide: Boolean flag: Prevents self-destruct/suicide behavior. [IDA: GrindRailParams]
IsRailFollowableOneTime: Boolean flag: Rail following occurs only once (no looping). [IDA: EnemyTakolienMovableOctaParams]
IsRandom: Boolean flag: Uses randomized behavior/timing. [IDA: DesignerAnimObjParams]
IsRejectPlayer: Boolean flag: Rejects/pushes players out of the area. [IDA: DendenLiftVersus2Params]
IsRequestWeaponOnly: Boolean flag: Only activates in response to weapon hits. [IDA: SwitchExplanationTextParams]
IsRespawn: Boolean. Tracks player respawn as trigger condition. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
IsRespawnReset: Boolean flag: Resets state on respawn. [IDA: StageSwitchFlagSetterParams]
IsReverse: Reverses direction: for lifts reverses travel direction, for destroy areas reverses the clear condition. [IDA: DendenLiftVersusParams|DestroyEnemyAreaParams]
IsReviveBySwitch: Boolean. Enemy can be revived by linked switch activation. [IDA: EnemyParams]
IsRillerSwingAerial: Boolean flag: Uses aerial swing behavior for the roller weapon. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsRoot: Boolean flag: Marks this as the root/primary node in a hierarchy. [IDA: SpectatorCameraBoundingAreaParams]
IsRot: Boolean flag: Enables rotation behavior. [IDA: EnemyTakolienFixedOctaParams, EnemyTakolienFixedParams]
IsRotClockwise: Boolean flag: Rotates in clockwise direction. [IDA: EnemyTakolienFixedOctaParams, EnemyTakolienFixedParams]
IsRotLaunchDashRing: Boolean flag: Applies rotation when launched from a dash ring. [IDA: VictoryBallOctaParams]
IsRotPatrol: Boolean flag: Rotates during patrol movement pattern. [IDA: EnemyTakolienFixedOctaParams, EnemyTakolienFixedParams]
IsSAI: Boolean. Uses SAI (Squid Amiibo Integration) mode. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:PlazaFestSignboard]
IsSaveAtCheckPoint: Boolean flag: Saves progress state at this checkpoint. [IDA: RailStepForwardPointOctaParams]
IsScrap: Boolean flag: Object can be scrapped/destroyed. [IDA: EnemyTakodozerOctaParams, EnemyTakodozerParams]
IsSetCameraXluFixBB: Boolean flag: Sets camera translucent fix bounding box. [IDA: InkBarOctaParams]
IsSetIsActivateOnEnter: Boolean flag: Activates when player enters the trigger volume. [IDA: ObjRespawnerParams]
IsSetMtxAtEnd: Boolean flag: Sets the transformation matrix at the end position. [IDA: LiftDemoDecoyOctaParams]
IsSetSpeedLocalProp: Boolean flag: Sets speed using local proportional values. [IDA: FlyingHoheiLauncherOctaParams]
IsShootUmbrellaCanopy: Boolean flag: Fires the umbrella canopy projectile. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsShotSwitch: Boolean. Activates when player fires within range. [IDA: RivalSquadParams]
IsShowIfWeaponA: Boolean flag: Visible only when weapon slot A is equipped. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
IsShowIfWeaponB: Boolean flag: Visible only when weapon slot B is equipped. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
IsShowIfWeaponC: Boolean flag: Visible only when weapon slot C is equipped. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
IsShowLiftAlertDbg: Boolean. Debug: Shows lift alert visualization. [IDA: LiftParams]
IsSideStep: Boolean flag: Enables side-step dodge movement. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsSink: Boolean flag: Object sinks in ink/liquid. [IDA: EnemyTakolienFixedOctaParams, EnemyTakolienFixedParams]
IsSleepWait: Boolean. Rival starts sleeping until triggered. [IDA: RivalSquadParams]
IsSpawnAtThisPos: Boolean flag: Spawns entities at this exact position. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerParams]
IsSpinnerChargeFull: Boolean flag: Spinner weapon starts fully charged. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsStableFirst: Boolean flag: Stabilizes to initial position before movement. [IDA: RollingBarrelOctaParams, RollingBarrelParams]
IsSteepPaint: Boolean. Allows ink painting on steep sponge surfaces. [IDA: SpongeParams]
IsStepType: Boolean flag: Uses step-based movement increments. [IDA: CheckPointBaseOctaParams]
IsStopEnemy: Boolean flag: Stops/freezes enemies in the area. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
IsStretch: Boolean flag: Enables stretch/scaling animation. [IDA: IkuraPlacementObjParams]
IsStrongHero: Boolean flag: Uses enhanced/powered-up hero stats. [IDA: RivalSquadOctaParams]
IsSwitchDrivenType: Boolean. Ink bar activation is driven by a linked switch. [IDA: InkBarParams]
IsSwitchStopSmooth: Boolean flag: Smooth deceleration when switch stops movement. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
IsTankTop: Boolean flag: Uses tank-top character model variant. [IDA: PlazaJerryLocatorParams]
IsTimer: Boolean flag: Operates on a timer-based trigger. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams, SwitchExplanationTextParams]
IsToggle: Boolean flag: Functions as a toggle (alternates on/off each activation). [IDA: StepSwitchOctaParams]
IsUmbrellaOpen: Boolean flag: Umbrella weapon starts in open/deployed state. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams, SwitchAreaPlayerActionParams]
IsUnableSkipAnimCalc: Boolean. Forces animation calculation to always run. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Jerry]
IsUnbindOnActivate: Boolean. Enemy unbinds from surface on activation. [IDA: EnemyParams]
IsUpdateTargetForPlayerLift: Boolean flag: Updates targeting when player uses a lift. [IDA: EnemyChargeOctaParams]
IsUseBase: Boolean flag: Uses the base/default behavior variant. [IDA: GrindRailParams]
IsUseContinuousBreakSEReduction: Boolean flag: Reduces sound effect volume during continuous breaking. [IDA: WoodenBoxOctaParams]
IsUseFillFootCol: Boolean flag: Uses fill-foot collision detection. [IDA: EnemyStampOctaParams]
IsUseFlyRotY: Boolean flag: Uses Y-axis rotation during flight. [IDA: BirdParams]
IsUseGenerateSE: Boolean flag: Plays a sound effect when generated/spawned. [IDA: AutoWarpPointBaseParams]
IsUseMuParamForEnd: Boolean. Uses MuParam data for blowout end position. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Blowouts/BlowoutsOnline]
IsUseMuParamForPlayerKnockBackInWall: Boolean. Uses MuParam for player knockback on wall collision. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Blowouts/BlowoutsOnline]
IsUseNavigate: Boolean flag: Enables navigation/pathfinding behavior. [IDA: ActorScheduleExecutorOctaParams]
IsUsePredictAlertOnOff: Boolean flag: Uses predictive alert on/off system. [IDA: PaintSwitchOctaParams]
IsUseScaleDamageForMaxMu: Boolean flag: Scales damage based on MaxMu parameter value. [IDA: SpongeVersusParams]
IsUseScaleMaxMu: Boolean flag: Enables scaling of the MaxMu parameter. [IDA: SpongeVersusParams]
IsUseSpecialCollisionForBury: Boolean. Uses special collision for buried state. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Sponge/SpongeOcta]
IsUseSprinkler: Boolean flag: Uses sprinkler sub-weapon behavior. [IDA: EnemyFlyingHoheiMotherOctaParams]
IsUsingRailAtt: Boolean. Uses rail attitude data for orientation. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Lift]
IsVGoal: Boolean flag: Counts as a victory goal/objective. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
IsWarnSE: Boolean flag: Plays warning sound effect before activation. [IDA: DamageConveyorOctaParams]
IsWarpTargetPosBlockL: Boolean flag: Blocks super jump to this position (large radius). [IDA: AnimDrivenLiftParams]
IsWarpTargetPosBlockW: Boolean flag: Blocks super jump to this position (wide area). [IDA: AnimDrivenLiftParams]
IsWeakReject: Boolean. Applies weak player rejection force. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Sponge/SpongeOcta/SpongeVersus]
IsWeakRejectXYZ: Boolean flag: Applies weak rejection force in all three axes. [IDA: ScrewLiftOnlineParams]
ItemDropableParams__DropNum: Number of items dropped on destruction. [IDA: ItemDropableParams]
ItemDropable__DropNum: Number of items dropped. Component variant. [IDA: ItemDropableParams]
JetpackNoPaintYesGnd: Boolean. Jetpack in this area: no ink painting but ground effects apply. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
JumpCameraName: Camera preset name used during jumps. [IDA: AutoWarpPointNextStageOctaParams, AutoWarpPointWorldParams]
JumpFootCheckNoPaintNoGnd: Boolean. Jump foot check: no painting and no ground effects. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
JumpPermitDist: Maximum distance from which jumping is permitted. [IDA: GrindRailParams]
KJumpLimitJumpVelStrong: Boolean. Limits strong jump velocity in the patch area. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
KillerModeSpeed: Speed multiplier during killer/pursuit mode. [IDA: EnemyFlyingHoheiOctaParams, EnemyFlyingHoheiParams]
Label: Text identifier string used for start positions, locators, explanation text objects, and conductor locators. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams|GeneralLocatorParams|StartPosParams|SubwayConductorLocatorOctaParams|SwitchExplanationTextParams]
LabelMain: Main text label string for tutorial messages. [IDA: SwitchTutorialTextParams]
LabelSub: Sub text label string for tutorial messages. [IDA: SwitchTutorialTextParams]
LaserMaxLength: Maximum length of the laser beam. [IDA: LaserLightObjOctaParams, RogPointOctaParams]
LastStandLaxAsLastStand: Boolean. Treats lax last-stand conditions as full last-stand. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
Length: Length (game units) of the ink bar. [IDA: InkBarParams]
Life: Life/HP value for the weak point. Destroyed when life reaches 0. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SwitchWeakPoint]
LiftAlertPredictFrame: Frames ahead the lift alert predicts position. [IDA: LiftParams]
LimitNum: Maximum number of active instances allowed. [IDA: RivalAppearLimitSetterOctaParams]
LocateID: Locator ID linking to a specific position. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SwitchWeakPoint]
LocationName: Internal location name string for scene identification. [IDA: EventFlowLocatorParams]
MainWeaponName: Main weapon type name identifier used by weapon setters, item cans, and weapon display symbols. [IDA: ItemCanMainSubOctaParams|WeaponSetterOctaParams|WeaponSymbolOctaParams]
Match: Match type identifier for mode-specific behavior. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
MaxBaseLength: Maximum base length for scalable objects. [IDA: IkuraPlacementObjParams]
MaxHeight: Maximum height the geyser launches the player. [IDA: GeyserParams]
MaxHp: Maximum hit points of the sponge. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Sponge/SpongeVersus]
MaxOffsetToNode: Maximum positional offset from the parent node. [IDA: EnemyEscapeOctaParams, EnemyEscapeParams]
MaxSpeedInAlpha: Maximum rolling speed when pushed by alpha team. [IDA: RollingBarrelOctaParams|RollingBarrelParams]
MaxSpeedInBravo: Maximum rolling speed when pushed by bravo team. [IDA: RollingBarrelOctaParams|RollingBarrelParams]
Memo: Developer memo/note string. Not used at runtime. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:LinkDstMapObjKillerOcta]
MessageLabel: Message label key for localized text display. [IDA: WorldHotaruLocatorParams, WorldHotaruParams]
MinBaseLength: Minimum base length for scalable objects. [IDA: IkuraPlacementObjParams]
Mode: Timer mode. 0=Countdown, other values for different timer behaviors. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SwitchTimer]
MoveAcc: Movement acceleration rate for lifts and sighter targets. [IDA: ScrewLiftOctaParams|SighterTargetParams]
MoveReturnAcc: Acceleration rate when returning to origin position. Used by lifts, pressure doors, and two-point lifts. [IDA: DendenLiftVersus2Params|PressureDoorParams|ScrewLiftOctaParams|TwoPointLiftParams]
MoveVelAcc: Velocity acceleration during forward movement for lifts and pressure doors. [IDA: DendenLiftVersus2Params|PressureDoorParams|TwoPointLiftParams]
MoveVelChargeFull: Velocity when screw lift is fully charged by player. [IDA: ScrewLiftParams]
Movement: Movement pattern type identifier. [IDA: PlazaJerryLocatorParams, PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
MovingFrame: Frames the ink bar spends moving during each cycle. [IDA: InkBarParams]
MsgTypeName: Message type name for the notification system. [IDA: AnnounceTimerParams]
Name: Internal name identifier for the switch sequence. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SwitchSequence]
NewsAppear: Controls whether the news bulletin NPC appears at this locator position. [IDA: PlazaJerryLocatorParams]
NewsOffset__X: X offset for NPC news display position. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
NewsOffset__Y: Y offset for news display. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
NewsOffset__Z: Z offset for news display. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
NewsRotY: Y-axis rotation for news bulletin display. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
NoAirFall: Boolean. Prevents air-fall mechanics in this area. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
NoConvexAttach: Boolean. Disables convex surface attachment. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
NoCrossPaint: When true, prevents cross-team ink painting from bomb flowers/Iida bombs. [IDA: BombFlowerParams|IidaBombOctaParams]
NoCulling: Disables rendering culling for this object. [IDA: EnemyTakopterMissileOctaParams]
NoSkip: Prevents skipping of this demo/cutscene sequence. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
NoUseRotatePiller: Boolean. Disables rotating pillar collision on painting lifts. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
NormalTimingTable: Primary timing table index for spawn scheduling. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
NormalTimingTable1: Secondary timing table index for spawn scheduling. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
NormalTimingTable2: Tertiary timing table index for spawn scheduling. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
NotDamageMoveCollision: Collision does not deal damage during movement. [IDA: PutOnBlockChangeCalcAreaParams]
OceanOffsetY: Y offset for ocean binding position. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Jerry]
OffCounter: Counter value at which the switch turns off. [IDA: PaintSwitchOctaParams, PaintSwitchParams]
OneTimeRotateDelay: Delay (frames) before one-time rotation begins. [IDA: LiftParams]
OneTimeRotateFrame: Duration (frames) of one-time rotation animation. [IDA: LiftParams]
OneTimeRotateInterpolationType: Interpolation for one-time rotation. 0=Linear, 1=Ease in/out. [IDA: LiftParams]
OutAreaSpeedRate: Speed rate multiplier when outside the area. [IDA: RailTogglePointParams]
OverwriteAttackBreakTime: Overrides the default attack break time duration. [IDA: EnemyTakopterBombOctaParams, EnemyTakopterBombParams, EnemyTakopterMissileOctaParams]
PaintRepeatFrame: Frame interval between repeated ink painting cycles. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
PaintReset: Resets ink/paint state in the area. [IDA: TimeLineDemoObjOctaParams]
PaintType: Type of ink painting behavior (0=normal, etc.). [IDA: BombFlowerParams, IidaBombOctaParams]
ParamCameraName0: Camera preset name for parameter slot 0. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
ParamCameraName1: Camera preset name for parameter slot 1. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
ParamCameraName2: Camera preset name for parameter slot 2. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
ParamCameraName3: Camera preset name for parameter slot 3. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
ParameterName: String name referencing an AI behavior parameter set. [IDA: RivalMapUnitParams]
PatrolFrontDirFixed: Fixes the patrol front direction orientation. [IDA: EnemyStarFishParams, EnemyTakopterOctaParams, EnemyTakopterParams]
PauseTimeAfterKilled: Seconds to pause after an enemy is killed. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
PlanType: Plan type for rival AI strategy selection. [IDA: RivalMapUnitParams]
PlayerApproachDistance: Distance at which player approach triggers behavior. [IDA: MissionGimmickParams]
PlayerChaseType: Type of player pursuit behavior pattern. [IDA: EnemyStarFishParams, EnemyTakopterOctaParams, EnemyTakopterParams]
PlayerInclusionRejectWeak: Weak rejection force when player is inside inclusion zone. [IDA: VictoryLiftOctaParams, VictoryLiftParams]
PlayerKnockBackInWallMuParam: Player knockback multiplier when hitting walls in blowouts. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:BlowoutsOnline]
PlayerMoveSpeedRatio: Player movement speed ratio (1.0 = normal). [IDA: SceneTransitionWalkTargetPosOctaParams]
PlayerReachRadius: Radius within which player is considered to have reached target. [IDA: SceneTransitionWalkTargetPosOctaParams]
PosOffset__X: X position offset for Power Egg railing objects. [IDA: IkuraRailingObjOctaParams]
PriorityTypeVal: Priority type value for scheduling/ordering. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjLastBossOctaParams]
Progress: Progress tracking value (0.0 to 1.0 or integer steps). [IDA: CheckPointHalfwayOctaParams, CheckPointParams]
Propeller: Propeller rotation behavior flag. [IDA: ScrewLiftOctaParams, ScrewLiftParams]
QuakeDecrement: Earthquake/shake intensity decay rate per frame. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
Radius: Radius (game units) of effect area. [IDA: InkBarParams/GeyserAutoParams]
RailFollowableParams__SolveType: Rail solve type for followable objects. [IDA: RailFollowableParams]
RailFollowable__SolveType: Solve type variant for RailFollowable component. [IDA: RailFollowableParams]
RailOffset: Positional offset distance from the rail path. [IDA: IkuraRailingObjOctaParams]
RailableParams__AttCalc: Attitude calculation mode for rail orientation. [IDA: RailableParams]
RailableParams__BreakFrame: Pause duration (frames) at rail break points. [IDA: RailableParams]
RailableParams__ConstantVelUnitLength: Unit length for constant velocity along rail. [IDA: RailableParams]
RailableParams__MoveFrame: Total frames for one rail traversal. [IDA: RailableParams]
RailableParams__Patrol: Patrol behavior mode on the rail. [IDA: RailableParams]
RailableParams__StandbyFrame: Standby duration (frames) at rail endpoints. [IDA: RailableParams]
Railable__SolveType: Solve type for Railable component. [IDA: RailFollowableParams]
RareTimingTable: Rare spawn timing table index. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
RareTimingTable1: Secondary rare spawn timing table index. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
RareTimingTable2: Tertiary rare spawn timing table index. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
ReflectVelVBall: Speed/velocity value: reflect vel v ball. [IDA: BunkerVBallOctaParams]
Reject: Player rejection force from the sponge. [IDA: SpongeParams]
RepeatOneTimeRot: Boolean. Repeats one-time rotation cyclically. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Lift]
RepeatOneTimeRotIntervalFrame: Interval (frames) between repeated one-time rotations. [IDA: LiftParams]
ReserveNum: Number of pre-allocated object instances in the spawn pool. Used by enemy spawners and gabons. [IDA: EnemyTakoGabonOctaParams|EnemyTakoGabonParams|IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams|IntervalSpawnerMultiParams|IntervalSpawnerParams]
RespawnInterval: Interval (frames) between respawn cycles. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:ObjRespawner]
RespawnReset: Boolean. Resets to initial state on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams/LiftParams]
RespawnWaitFrame: Number of frames to wait before respawning. [IDA: RivalMapUnitOctaParams]
RestCountForCompass: Remaining target count before compass activates. [IDA: BreakCounterBaseOctaParams]
RestTimeSec: Rest/idle time in seconds between actions. [IDA: SwitchTimeLimitRestTimeOctaParams]
ReturnTimer: Timer duration for return-to-origin behavior. [IDA: SwitchAreaPlayerActionOctaParams]
ReuseRespawnReset: Reuses respawn reset state from previous checkpoint. [IDA: SwitchDemoPlayerOctaParams]
RoleID: Role identifier for squad/team position assignment. [IDA: PointForTutorialParams]
RollSpeed: Speed of the rolling/spinning animation for flying Hohei mother ships. [IDA: EnemyFlyingHoheiMotherOctaParams|EnemyFlyingHoheiMotherParams]
RotPatrole360: Enables full 360-degree patrol rotation. [IDA: EnemyChargeOctaParams, EnemyChargeParams, EnemySpinnerOctaParams, EnemySpinnerParams]
RotSpeedDegPerSec: Rotation speed in degrees per second. [IDA: UFOParams]
RotSpeedMax: Maximum rotation speed (degrees/frame) for rotating lifts and toggle points. [IDA: DendenLiftVersusParams|RotateTogglePointParams]
RotateAtEnd__X: X rotation (degrees) applied at rail endpoint. [IDA: 5.5.2 LiftParams::readMuObj]
RotateAtEnd__Y: Y rotation (degrees) applied at rail endpoint. [IDA: 5.5.2 LiftParams::readMuObj]
RotateAtEnd__Z: Z rotation (degrees) applied at rail endpoint. [IDA: 5.5.2 LiftParams::readMuObj]
RotateSpeedDegPerSec: Rotation speed in degrees per second. [IDA: IkuraPlacementObjParams]
RunOverSubWeapon: Boolean. Lift destroys sub weapons on its surface. [IDA: LiftParams]
SEType: Sound effect type identifier. [IDA: CompassOctaParams, CompassParams]
ScaleDamageForMaxMu: Damage scaling factor based on max MuParam value. [IDA: SpongeVersusParams]
Scale_Max_Mu: Maximum scale multiplier from MuParam. [IDA: SpongeVersusParams]
SceneName: Scene/level name string for transitions. [IDA: PlazaDoorParams]
SchedulableParams__ScheduleName: Schedule name string for the appearance table in ActorSchedulable system. [IDA: 5.5.2 SchedulableParams]
SchedulableParams__SwitchAppearDelay: Delay in frames after switch activation before appearance. [IDA: 5.5.2 SchedulableParams]
ScheduleGroupName: Schedule group name for coordinated timing. [IDA: ActorScheduleExecutorOctaParams]
ScrollVelLocalX: Local X-axis scroll velocity for conveyor surface. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:ConveyerParams]
SetOn: Sets the initial on/off state. [IDA: StageSwitchFlagSetterParams]
Size: Size level of the paint switch. 1=Default. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:PaintSwitch]
SizeX: X-dimension size of painting surface. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
SizeZ: Z-dimension size of painting surface. [IDA: PaintingLiftParams]
SoundSourceGroupIdx: Sound source group index for audio management. [IDA: ConveyerParams]
SpawnOrder: Order/priority for spawning sequence. [IDA: EnemyTakoGabonOctaParams, EnemyTakoGabonParams, IntervalSpawnerMultiParams]
SpawnType: Rival spawn behavior (parachute, super jump, etc.). [IDA: RivalSquadParams]
SpecialAutoIncSec: Seconds between automatic special gauge increments in paint target areas. [IDA: PaintTargetAreaParams]
SpecialChargeFrame: Frames required to charge special weapon. [IDA: RivalMapUnitOctaParams]
SpecialFest: Special Splatfest object type variant. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SpecialFestObj]
SpecialReChargeFrame: Frames required to recharge special weapon. [IDA: RivalMapUnitOctaParams]
SpecialStr: Special string parameter. Context-dependent. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Generic]
SpeedOff: Movement speed when deactivated/off state. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
SpeedOn: Movement speed when activated/on state. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
SquadActorName: Squad member actor name for team spawning. [IDA: RivalAppearAreaOctaParams, RivalAppearAreaParams]
StageViewDemoAnim: Boolean. Plays animation during stage view demo. [IDA: LiftParams]
StartFrame: Frame number at which the effect/animation begins. [IDA: DemoMessageStartObjOctaParams, LastBoss05DefenceUIInObjOctaParams, RivalShotToPlayerInDemoStarterOctaParams]
StartWaitFrame: Number of frames to wait before starting. [IDA: TimeLimitStartAreaOctaParams]
StealthForEnemySearchOneMore: Boolean. Extra stealth check for enemy search in area. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
StepPaintMapPaintableChangerDel: Boolean. Step paint delegates to map paintable changer. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
StopPlayerMove: Prevents player movement while active. [IDA: ParamCameraDemoPlayerOctaParams]
StreamBufferSizeMiB: Streaming buffer size in megabytes. [IDA: StreamingObjParams]
StretchFrame: Duration in frames for the stretch animation. [IDA: IkuraPlacementObjParams]
SubWeaponName: Sub weapon type name identifier used by weapon setters, item cans, and weapon display symbols. [IDA: ItemCanMainSubOctaParams|WeaponSetterOctaParams|WeaponSymbolOctaParams]
SuperBallHoverAltitudeInflate: Baller hover altitude inflation factor. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Geyser]
SuperLandingCliffCheckSlope: Boolean. Checks cliff slope for super landing in area. [IDA: PatchAreaParams]
SwitchStopFrame: Number of frames the switch pauses movement. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
SwitchStopRegist: Registers stop behavior with the switch system. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams, RailTogglePointParams]
SwitchType: Switch activation type for rival squad triggers. [IDA: RivalSquadParams]
SwitchableParams__RespawnReset: Whether switch resets on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
Switchable__RespawnReset: Whether switch resets on respawn. [IDA: SwitchableParams]
Tag: String tag for map object identification and grouping. [IDA: 5.5.2 GeneralMapTagOcta params]
TalkBaseDir: Base direction angle for NPC talk trigger. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
TalkDirRange: Angular range for NPC talk trigger detection. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
TalkExclusionDirRange: Angular range excluded from talk trigger. [IDA: PlazaNpcLocatorParams]
TalkerId: NPC talker identifier for dialogue system. [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams, SwitchExplanationTextParams]
Team: Team assignment. 0=Alpha, 1=Bravo, 2=Neutral. Sets initial ink ownership. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:Common]
TerminateAtTerminal: Terminates movement at the rail terminal point. [IDA: RailTogglePointOctaParams]
Text: Text parameter for camera effect areas. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:CameraEffectArea]
ThDistance_WaterHigh: Threshold distance for high water level detection. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
ThDistance_WaterMid: Threshold distance for mid water level detection. [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SeaSurfaceVersus]
ThinOutInterval: Interval for thinning out/culling spawned objects. [IDA: SwitchThinOutOctaParams]
Time: Timer duration (frames or seconds depending on Mode). [IDA: 5.5.2 only, CTX:SwitchTimer/SwitchTimerOcta]
TimeLimitSec: Time limit in seconds for the timed section. [IDA: TimeLimitSetterOctaParams]
TimeLineName: Duration for line name in seconds. [IDA: TimeLineDemoObjOctaParams]
Timer: Timer duration value (purpose varies by actor). [IDA: ExplanationTextObjOctaParams]
Timing: Trigger timing mode for switch areas. [IDA: SwitchAreaBaseParams]
TotemIndex: Index in a totem/stacked object arrangement. [IDA: IntervalSpawnerForEnemyRockParams]
